results.title: Early look at Virginia Tech's 2026 Week 10 opponent SMU
results.description: The Mustangs notched wins over Clemson, Miami and Louisville in their second season in the ACC to prove they are capable of competing with the league’s best on a weekly basis.

results.title: What Scotland need to qualify for World Cup last 32 after 3-0 Brazil loss
results.description: What do Scotland need to qualify for the World Cup last 32? Sports Mole breaks down the third-place standings, qualification rules, and the key results they need.
